description: Second-slice fixture closeout and next queue selection

decision_notes: The second-slice Oracle Think Tank recipe can be used as an offline runtime/test fixture.
The fixture is not a saved player deck and is not automatically visible in UI.
Bot/playbook runtime use still needs a separate gate.

next_queue.title: Second Fixture Consumption and Third-Slice Scale Gate
next_queue.goal: Validate how the Oracle Think Tank fixture can be consumed safely, then decide whether to scale recipe work to another clan slice.

tasks.title: Second fixture schema validator
tasks.goal: Validate the Oracle Think Tank runtime fixture independently from the M41 generator.

tasks.title: Second fixture deck text exporter
tasks.goal: Export the Oracle Think Tank fixture as reviewable count-line deck text without adding it to saved decks.

tasks.title: Second fixture headless load smoke
tasks.goal: Load the Oracle Think Tank fixture through offline/headless paths without UI or bot mutation.

tasks.title: Multi-fixture scale decision
tasks.goal: Review Nova Grappler and Oracle Think Tank fixture evidence before selecting any third slice.
